name: IronNet
description: This app provides generic actions for interacting with IronDefense

actions.name: Rate Alert
actions.description: Provides a rating for an Alert within IronDefense

parameters.name: alert_id
parameters.description: The ID of the IronDefense alert

parameters.name: analyst_severity
parameters.description: The severity of the alert

parameters.name: analyst_expectation
parameters.description: The analyst expectation for the alert

parameters.name: comment
parameters.description: Text of comment

parameters.name: share_comment_with_irondome
parameters.description: Shares the provided comment with IronDome

actions.name: Set Alert Status
actions.description: Sets the status of an Alert within IronDefense

parameters.name: alert_id
parameters.description: The ID of the IronDefense alert

parameters.name: alert_status
parameters.description: The status of the alert

parameters.name: comment
parameters.description: Text of comment

parameters.name: share_comment_with_irondome
parameters.description: Shares the provided comment with IronDome

actions.name: Comment On Alert
actions.description: Adds a comment to an Alert within IronDefense

parameters.name: alert_id
parameters.description: The ID of the IronDefense alert

parameters.name: comment
parameters.description: Text of comment

parameters.name: share_comment_with_irondome
parameters.description: Shares the provided comment with IronDome

actions.name: Report Bad Activity
actions.description: Reports observed bad activity to IronDefense

parameters.name: name
parameters.description: Identifying name of the observed bad activity

parameters.name: description
parameters.description: Description of the observed bad activity

parameters.name: domain
parameters.description: Domain associated with the observed bad activity

parameters.name: ip
parameters.description: IP associated with the observed bad activity

parameters.name: activity_start_time
parameters.description: Start time of observed bad activity - in RFC3339 format (https://tools.ietf.org/html/rfc3339)

parameters.name: activity_end_time
parameters.description: End time of observed bad activity - in RFC3339 format (https://tools.ietf.org/html/rfc3339)

actions.name: Get Community Info
actions.description: Gets community information related to an IronDefense alert

parameters.name: alert_id
parameters.description: The ID of the IronDefense alert

actions.name: Get Events
actions.description: Retrieves IronDefense Events for a given Alert ID

parameters.name: alert_id
parameters.description: The ID of the alert associated with the events to retrieve

parameters.name: alert_id
parameters.description: The IDs of the IronDefense alerts to filter. Enter in CSV format

parameters.name: category
parameters.description: The categories of the IronDefense alerts to filter. Enter in CSV format

parameters.name: sub_category
parameters.description: The subcategories of the IronDefense alerts to filter. Enter in CSV format

parameters.name: status
parameters.description: The statuses of the IronDefense alerts to filter. Enter in CSV format

parameters.name: min_severity
parameters.description: The minimum severity of IronDefense alerts to filter

parameters.name: max_severity
parameters.description: The maximum severity of IronDefense alerts to filter

actions.name: Get Event
actions.description: Retrieves IronDefense Event for a given Event ID

parameters.name: event_id
parameters.description: The ID of the event to retrieve
